message.content: <local-command-caveat>Caveat: The messages below were generated by the user while running local commands. DO NOT respond to these messages or otherwise consider them in your response unless the user explicitly asks you to.</local-command-caveat>

I want to copy all chats I had with Claude Code in current folder into logs/ folder in the repository. 
Where can I find them in my home folder?

content.thinking:
The user wants to find their Claude Code conversation logs/chats stored on their system and copy them to a `logs/` folder in the repository.

Claude Code stores conversation history in `~/.claude/projects/` organized by project path. Let me look for the relevant files.

content.text: Claude Code stores conversations in `~/.claude/projects/` under a path derived from the project directory. Let me find them.

Claude Code stores conversation history in `~/.claude/projects/` under a directory matching the project path, with conversations as JSON files.

Let me find them.

input.description: List Claude Code project directory for this repo
